sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n18633" key="a)xa/lkeos" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="full" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">ἀχάλκ-εος</orth>, <itype lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="itype">ον</itype>, <sense id="n18633.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">without a</tr_> <foreign lang="greek" TEIform="foreign">χαλκοῦς,</foreign> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">penniless,</tr_> <foreign lang="greek" TEIform="foreign">ἀ. οὐδός</foreign> (with a pun on <foreign lang="greek" TEIform="foreign">χάλκεος οὐδός</foreign>) <bibl default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <title_ TEIform="title">AP</title_> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">11.403</biblScope> </bibl> (<bibl default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Lucill.</author> </bibl>).</sense> </entryFree>
